# Vendored upstream config snapshot

Frozen copy of the official `config.json` for `Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B`,
fetched 2026-05-08 from
`https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B/resolve/main/config.json`.

This is the canonical kernel-ABI source for `src/model.rs`. Do not edit
it. When refreshing it for a new upstream revision, replace the file in
one commit and update `docs/kernel-dev/MODEL_SHAPE.md` in the same
commit so the two never diverge.
